summary: Convergence-loop manifest emission and resume integration delivered. convergence_manifest_helper.py provides build_convergence_manifest() (sha256 + artifactUri per key output), write_convergence_manifest() (validates + writes evidence-manifest.json), and scan_prior_convergence_manifest() (hash verification). Convergence loop patched with --check-manifest-resume flag, resume scan on startup, manifest emission after run, and evidenceManifestPath back-patched into baseline output. Smoke 6/6 pass.
expectedEvidence: hash mismatch and missing artifact tests

artifacts.description: build_convergence_manifest() maps final_paths keys to artifact types, hashes files, produces EvidenceManifest. write_convergence_manifest() validates + writes. scan_prior_convergence_manifest() wraps scan_manifest_for_resume() with sha256 verification.

_emit_convergence_manifest() and _check_manifest_resume() helpers added. --check-manifest-resume / --check-manifest-resume-strict CLI flags. Resume scan on startup before round loop. Manifest emitted after summary write; evidenceManifestPath back-patched into baseline_payload.
6 tests: build-with-files, write, resume-ok, hash-mismatch, missing-file, empty-final-paths. All pass.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Manifest emission with input fingerprint, artifact URIs, sha256, row counts
acceptanceMapping.evidence: build_convergence_manifest: sha256+size per file, artifactUri=atm://lake/{runId}/sources/..., inputFingerprint.sha256; test build-manifest-with-files PASS

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Resume validation fails fast on missing artifacts, hash mismatch
acceptanceMapping.evidence: tests resume-scan-missing-file PASS (missing=1), resume-scan-hash-mismatch PASS (hash_mismatch=1); --check-manifest-resume-strict returns exit 2

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Resume scan telemetry-driven; no source-specific or filename shortcuts
acceptanceMapping.evidence: scan_prior_convergence_manifest wraps evidence_manifest.scan_manifest_for_resume; source IDs derived from run_id+suffix, never hardcoded

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Manifest integration supports no-write preview runs
acceptanceMapping.evidence: test empty-final-paths PASS (file_count=0 on no artifacts); _emit_convergence_manifest returns None when manifest.files is empty

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0604: parity rehearsal gate using convergence run baseline manifest
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0605: vector smoke linkage using externalCardsPath from baseline
